channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 63/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 29.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer to face Badenoch at PMQs after UK lifts Russian oil sanctions – politics live
item.description: Starmer to face Badenoch at PMQs after UK lifts Russian oil sanctions – politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: PMQs latest: Starmer faces first grilling since Streeting quit government after Labour election mauling
item.description: PMQs latest: Starmer faces first grilling since Streeting quit government after Labour election mauling

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Supermarket bosses say food price caps would be ‘preposterous’ and ‘idiotic’
item.description: Supermarket bosses say food price caps would be ‘preposterous’ and ‘idiotic’

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer under fire after UK quietly eases strict sanctions on Russian oil
item.description: Starmer under fire after UK quietly eases strict sanctions on Russian oil

item.title: Independent UK Politics: I worked for Andy Burnham – here’s why he would be a brilliant prime minister
